notes: Study is about chest wall reconstruction using methyl methacrylate — completely unrelated to stair climbing or cardiovascular health. Removed.
UK Biobank prospective cohort: daily flights of stairs climbed associated with lower all-cause, cancer, and CVD mortality
Atherosclerosis 2023: 5+ flights/day (~50 steps) associated with ~20% lower atherosclerotic CVD risk, independent of other activity and disease susceptibility
